subjects.description: fireworks above the Golden Gate Bridge

subjects.relative_size: large bursts spanning the sky over the bridge
subjects.orientation: radiating outward and downward in layered arcs

subjects.action: explode, shimmer, fade, and refresh in overlapping patterns

subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: colored light particles, bright cores, smoky edges

actions.description: fireworks begin bursting above the orange bridge towers, lighting the bay with red and blue reflections
the display intensifies into overlapping green, red, and blue blooms while spectators record the scene
sparkling trails drift downward around the towers as smoke and reflections soften over the water
